exact_claim_text: The full completed dataset contains 212 responses.
SME-only analyses use 172 micro, small and medium-sized firms.
Active AI use is 73/212 = 34.4% in the full completed sample.
allowable_public_wording: 34.4% of the full completed sample reported active AI use

exact_claim_text: Active AI use is 54/172 = 31.4% in the SME-only sample.
allowable_public_wording: 31.4% of SME respondents reported active AI use

exact_claim_text: The public repository excludes raw LimeSurvey exports, IP addresses, exact timestamps and open text.
allowable_public_wording: public quantitative dataset without direct identifiers or open text
forbidden_wording: raw dataset is public and fully anonymous
remediation_needed: manual review before public text release
